sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: EFC Earning Date, Earning Analysis and Earning Prediction
feed.summary: This article provides an earnings analysis and prediction for EFC, focusing on past quarterly results, future forecasts, and stock price correlation with earnings revisions. It highlights key financial figures like revenue and EPS for recent quarters and analyst estimates for 2026/Q1, noting that unchanged estimates have corresponded with a stock price dip, potentially offering a buying opportunity. The article also touches on historical stock reactions around earnings dates and offers insights into Ellington Financial Inc.'s Q4 2025 earnings call sentiment.

feed.title: Mobix Labs (MOBX): F-22 Program Component Demand Jumps 5X as Production Advances
feed.summary: Mobix Labs (Nasdaq: MOBX) has reported a significant increase in its involvement with the F-22 Raptor program, including a new customer and expanded demand from an existing partner. This activity represents a five-fold jump in component orders, with production already underway for deliveries scheduled in 2026. The company emphasizes its expanded role in supplying mission-critical components for the F-22 Raptor, a key U.S. air superiority platform.

feed.title: Benchmark reiterates T-Mobile stock Buy rating on pricing strength
feed.summary: Benchmark has reiterated a Buy rating and a $295 price target for T-Mobile US (NASDAQ:TMUS) shares, noting the company's strong competitive position and resistance to geopolitical uncertainties. Despite its market leadership and valuation indicating it's undervalued, T-Mobile maintains a price advantage for customers and is projected for 2.5% to 3.0% average revenue per account growth in 2026. Other recent developments include a declared quarterly dividend and upgrades from other analyst firms.

feed.title: Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) Price Target Lowered to $580.00 at Robert W. Baird
feed.summary: Robert W. Baird lowered its price target for Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) to $580 from $675, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the company beating Q1 earnings expectations. Deere reported $2.42 EPS on $9.61 billion in revenue, exceeding analyst consensus. Other analysts have varying price targets, with the overall consensus being a "Moderate Buy" for the stock.

feed.title: Assessing Microchip Technology (MCHP) Valuation After AI Sector Rally And Options-Driven Price Surge
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) recently experienced a sharp stock increase due to an AI sector rally and options trading, despite mixed performance over the last year. While one popular narrative suggests the stock is 24.6% undervalued with a fair value of $86.67, driven by AI and edge computing demand, another DCF model indicates it might be slightly overvalued at $65.38. Investors are encouraged to review the underlying data and risks to decide on the trade-offs between potential upside and downside.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Price Target Cut to $18.00 by Analysts at Evercore
feed.summary: Evercore has reduced its price target for Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) to $18.00 from $19.00, implying a 15.87% upside, following mixed Q3 earnings where EPS missed estimates but revenue slightly beat. The company also narrowed and lowered its full-year profit guidance, leading to a "Reduce" consensus rating and an average target price of $16.53 among analysts. Despite a high dividend yield, the stock is trading near its one-year low, reflecting ongoing analyst skepticism and selling pressure.

feed.title: Assessing Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Valuation After A Recent Pullback In Share Performance
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) has experienced a recent pullback in share price, declining 10% in the last month, yet gaining over 5% in the last three months, with a 1-year return of 5.82%. While a popular analyst narrative suggests ITW is 7% undervalued with a fair value of $280.88, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates it might be overvalued at its current price of $260.54, with a fair value of $169.75. Investors are encouraged to consider both perspectives and analyze potential risks and rewards.

feed.title: Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) Price Target Lowered to $90.00 at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) to $90.00 from $110.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 37.6%. Despite the target reduction, the company slightly surpassed quarterly EPS expectations and maintained stable revenue year-over-year, setting FY2026 EPS guidance between $13.80 and $14.00. The consensus analyst rating for Global Payments is "Hold" with an average price target of $90.27.

feed.title: Cyberattack hits Hasbro, impacting orders and shipping
feed.summary: Hasbro Inc. reported a cyberattack that is expected to cause product delays for weeks, impacting its ability to accept orders, ship products, and conduct other operations. The company discovered the unauthorized access on Saturday and has taken systems offline, bringing in third-party forensics experts to investigate. Hasbro is working to assess if data was stolen and plans to notify authorities while ensuring future business operations are secure.

feed.title: Gartner Says General Counsel Should Assess AI Insurance to Mitigate AI Risks
feed.summary: Gartner advises that General Counsel must evaluate new "affirmative AI insurance" offerings to manage the increasing risks associated with AI, as traditional policies often exclude AI-related incidents. These specialized policies cover issues like AI hallucinations, bias, and IP infringement, which are not adequately addressed by standard business insurance. The firm predicts that by 2030, P&C insurers will require strong AI risk controls, boosting AI security and governance practices for companies seeking coverage.

feed.title: NEW T. ROWE PRICE PODCAST EPISODE EXAMINES THE FUTURE OF AI AND HUMAN ADVANTAGE
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has released a new podcast episode titled "Humans vs. Machines: David Rowan on Curiosity, Creativity, and the Future of AI," featuring Justin Thomson and David Rowan. The discussion explores how artificial intelligence could rapidly transform the global economy and reshape various industries. It also highlights the increasing importance of human skills like curiosity, creativity, and judgment in an AI-driven world for businesses and investors.

feed.title: Medtech giant Stryker fully operational after data-wiping attack
feed.summary: Medical technology company Stryker announced it is fully operational three weeks after a data-wiping cyberattack by the Iranian-linked Handala hacktivist group. The company restored systems to pre-attack operational levels and production is rapidly returning to full capacity. The FBI also seized two websites used by the Handala hackers, who are known for targeting Israeli organizations and have been linked to Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security.

feed.title: ROLLINS ACQUIRES ROMEX PEST CONTROL
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. has acquired Romex Pest Control, a "top 40" pest management company headquartered in Pleasant Grove, UT. This acquisition will expand Rollins' presence into new regions and allow Romex to scale its operations while maintaining its brand identity. Rollins emphasized its commitment to a disciplined acquisition strategy and Romex highlighted shared values regarding customer and community commitment.

feed.title: Senior legal shakeup at Landstar (LSTR) as longtime general counsel departs
feed.summary: Landstar System, Inc. (LSTR) announced a significant change in its legal department as Michael K. Kneller, Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary since 2005, will resign on May 8, 2026, to join the law firm Scopelitis, Garvin, Light, Hanson & Feary, P.C. To ensure continuity, Landstar has appointed Vallie S. Dugas, currently Vice President and Assistant General Counsel, as Interim Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary, effective the same date. The company frames this as an orderly career transition, with an internal interim replacement to maintain legal and governance continuity.

feed.title: Ford's first-quarter US auto sales fall amid affordability concerns
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company reported a nearly 9% decrease in U.S. sales for the first quarter of 2026, totaling 457,315 vehicles. This decline is attributed to ongoing affordability issues, including high borrowing costs, elevated car prices, and the lack of federal tax credits for electric vehicles, which have collectively dampened consumer demand. The broader auto industry, including competitors like General Motors and Toyota, is facing similar challenges.

feed.title: Landstar General Counsel to Join Scopelitis Law Firm Names Assistant General Counsel as Interim General Counsel
feed.summary: Landstar System, Inc. announced that Michael K. Kneller, its Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary, will depart on May 8th to become a partner at Scopelitis, Garvin, Light, Hanson & Feary, P.C. Vallie S. Dugas, currently Assistant General Counsel, has been appointed Interim General Counsel and Secretary. Landstar plans to name a permanent successor later this year, considering both internal and external candidates.

feed.title: McDonald's Under $3 Menu will make its debut later this month
feed.summary: McDonald's is set to launch an "Under $3 Menu" on April 21, featuring popular low-priced items and a rotating selection, alongside a new $4 Breakfast Meal Deal. This initiative is a response to weakening economic conditions, rising gas prices, and declining consumer sentiment, as the fast-food giant continues its focus on value. Franchisees have approved the plan, despite potential profitability concerns in some markets, emphasizing McDonald's commitment to value leadership.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Real Estate Companies: Realty Income (O) and Jones Lang Lasalle (JLL)
feed.summary: Two real estate companies, Realty Income (O) and Jones Lang Lasalle (JLL), received bullish sentiments from analysts. Deutsche Bank maintained a Buy rating for Realty Income with a $70.00 price target, while Goldman Sachs maintained a Buy rating for Jones Lang Lasalle with a $409.00 price target. Both companies currently have an analyst consensus of Moderate Buy and Strong Buy, respectively.

feed.title: Ford (NYSE: F) grows Q1 2026 retail share with trucks and big SUVs
feed.summary: Ford reported an increase in its Q1 2026 U.S. retail market share to 11.6%, a gain of 0.2 percentage points, driven by strong demand for high-margin F-Series trucks and large SUVs like Explorer and Expedition. Despite an 8.8% decline in total U.S. vehicle sales due to planned product transitions and a challenging comparison to the previous year, F-Series remained America’s best-selling truck and Ford Pro software subscriptions and BlueCruise usage saw significant growth. The company is focusing on high-demand segments and offering diverse price points to meet customer needs.

feed.title: Clorox completes Gojo acquisition, bringing Purell into portfolio
feed.summary: The Clorox Company has finalized its acquisition of Gojo Industries, integrating the Purell hand sanitizer brand and Gojo's broader hygiene solutions into its portfolio. The combined entity will be known as Clorox Purell and will maintain its headquarters in Ohio, with former Gojo CEO Carey Jaros leading the new business. This strategic move aims to enhance Clorox's presence in both consumer and institutional hygiene markets through Gojo's established B2B distribution and product systems.

feed.title: Corning (GLW) SVP awarded 4,846 RSUs, holds stock and multi-year grants
feed.summary: Stefan Becker, Senior Vice President of Corning Incorporated, was granted 4,846 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 1, 2026, which are set to vest fully on April 16, 2029. This award, detailed in a Form 4 filing, adds to his current direct holding of 6,344 common shares and multiple pre-existing RSU grants scheduled to vest through 2029. The RSU grants are part of his compensation, linking his future earnings to the company's performance.

feed.title: MIMEDX to Sponsor Leading Advanced Wound Care Conferences
feed.summary: MIMEDX Group (NASDAQ: MDXG) announced its sponsorship and participation in two major wound care conferences: SAWC Spring 2026 and the Diabetic Limb Salvage (DLS) 2026 Conference. The company will present scientific data through symposia, poster, and oral presentations, showcasing its peptide-based and placental allograft wound care technologies. This engagement highlights MIMEDX's commitment to advancing wound care science, particularly with its stock trading near its 52-week low.

feed.title: Starbucks workers can earn up to $1,200 extra under new pay plan
feed.summary: Starbucks (SBUX) has announced a new incentive rewards program for its hourly employees, allowing them to earn up to an additional $1,200 annually through quarterly bonuses based on store performance. The company is also expanding tipping options and moving to weekly pay for all U.S. partners to provide more flexibility. These changes are part of Starbucks' "Back to Starbucks" transformation, aiming to improve employee compensation and the customer experience.

feed.title: Texas Pacific is the most oversold U.S. energy stock (XLE:NYSEARCA)
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (TPL) is highlighted as the most oversold U.S. energy stock, according to an RSI screen. The article notes that several energy companies, including MPLX LP, BKV Corporation, Excelerate Energy, and CNX Resources, are showing oversold conditions after recent market volatility. These companies span various segments of the energy sector, such as oil and gas exploration, storage, and transportation, with market caps ranging from $2.7 billion to $56 billion.

feed.title: onsemi (NASDAQ: ON) 2026 proxy: 2025 $6.0B revenue, director elections and pay vote
feed.summary: onsemi is holding its 2026 annual meeting where stockholders will vote on electing seven directors, an advisory say-on-pay resolution, ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers as the auditor for 2026, and a stockholder proposal on simple majority voting. The proxy statement highlights the company's 2025 financial performance, including $6.0 billion in revenue, strong cash flow generation, and disciplined capital returns through share repurchases. It also details governance practices, ESG initiatives, and a pay-for-performance executive compensation program, which saw mixed payouts in 2025 due to market conditions and relative TSR performance.

feed.title: Lloyds (NYSE: LYG) keeps motor finance redress provision unchanged
feed.summary: Lloyds Banking Group plc has announced that it will not change its existing provision for UK motor finance redress, following the FCA's final rules for an industry-wide scheme. Despite this, the group flagged ongoing uncertainties such as customer response rates, operational costs, and potential litigation, which could lead to a different eventual outcome. Lloyds plans to provide a further update with its first-quarter results at the end of April, reaffirming its commitment to timely and appropriate redress for customers.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Initiates Coverage on FCX with a Buy Rating and $70 Target | FCX Stock News
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has initiated coverage on Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) with a Buy rating and a price target of $70.00 USD, indicating confidence in the company's future growth. This new rating follows various adjustments from other analysts, with the average analyst target price for FCX now standing at $67.12, implying a potential 9.67% upside from its current price. However, GuruFocus' estimated GF Value suggests a 12.14% downside for the stock.

feed.title: Lipocine Reports Topline Safety and Efficacy Results for LPCN 1154 in Patients with Postpartum Depression
feed.summary: Lipocine Inc. announced that its Phase 3 trial for LPCN 1154 (oral brexanolone) in postpartum depression (PPD) did not meet its primary endpoint in the overall patient population. However, a post hoc analysis of participants with a history of psychiatric conditions showed nominal statistically significant and clinically meaningful reductions in HAM-D scores compared to placebo. The company plans to evaluate all available options and has applied for breakthrough therapy and fast track designations for LPCN 1154 in this subset of patients.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterates HCA Healthcare stock Overweight rating
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reiterated an Overweight rating for HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) with a $588.00 price target. The firm noted positively trending survey results indicating a favorable outlook for 2026 compared to 2025, aligning with recent analyst sentiment and upward earnings revisions. Despite an anticipated year-over-year headwind, the stock appears undervalued according to InvestingPro's Fair Value analysis.

feed.title: Crown Castle (CCI) Is Up 5.0% After Tower-Focused Restructuring And Asset Sales Plan - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Crown Castle (CCI) shares rose 5.0% after the company announced a major restructuring plan, including workforce reductions, the sale of its small cell and fiber operations, a US$1.00 billion share buyback, and a US$7.00 billion debt reduction. These strategic shifts aim to focus Crown Castle on its core U.S. tower business, addressing balance sheet strength and dividend coverage concerns amidst mixed analyst views. The divestiture is expected to clarify the company's investment narrative and improve its financial flexibility, though execution risk remains for the fiber asset sales.

feed.title: J&J among Fortune 2026 America’s Most Innovative Companies list
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson has been named to Fortune's 2026 America’s Most Innovative Companies list, marking its inclusion every year since the list's inception in 2023. The recognition highlights the company's commitment to innovation across product development, process improvement, and fostering an innovative culture, aligning with its Our Credo mission statement. J&J's efforts in healthcare advancements, from immunology to AI-enhanced robotics, are central to its forward-thinking approach.

feed.title: Inc. Names Flodesk Co-Founder and CEO Rebecca Shostak to Its 2026 Female Founders 500 List
feed.summary: Rebecca Shostak, co-founder and CEO of Flodesk, has been recognized on Inc.'s 2026 Female Founders 500 list for her leadership in creating a design-first email marketing platform for small businesses. Flodesk, which has achieved $36 million in annual recurring revenue entirely bootstrapped, empowers entrepreneurs with powerful and visually appealing marketing tools. Shostak is further driving innovation by integrating proprietary AI technology to enhance the platform's capabilities and expand into the broader marketing ecosystem.

feed.title: Coca-Cola celebrates decades of restaurant partnerships with ‘And a Coke’
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has launched a new campaign titled "And a Coke" to celebrate its long-standing partnerships with various quick-service restaurants (QSRs) across the US. The campaign highlights the ubiquity of ordering a Coke with meals, featuring 13 major QSR partners and showcasing the diverse range of customers who end their orders with "And a Coke." This initiative aims to emphasize the interconnectedness of Coca-Cola with the foodservice industry and promote the unique offerings of its restaurant partners.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Utilities Companies: Cadiz (CDZI) and Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG)
feed.summary: Two utilities companies, Cadiz (CDZI) and Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG), recently received bullish sentiments from analysts. Maxim Group maintained a Buy rating for Cadiz with a $10.00 price target, while Morgan Stanley and Barclays initiated/maintained Buy ratings for Constellation Energy Corporation, with price targets of $385.00 and $356.00 respectively.

feed.title: Corning (NYSE: GLW) CTO awarded 5,689 RSUs vesting in 2029
feed.summary: Corning Incorporated's SVP and Chief Technology Officer, Jaymin Amin, was granted 5,689 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 1, 2026. These new RSUs will vest 100% on April 16, 2029. In addition to this grant, Amin holds other RSU awards and common stock directly and indirectly through the company’s 401(k) plan.

feed.title: The Lovesac Company (NASDAQ:LOVE) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Lovesac Company (NASDAQ:LOVE) reported its Q4 and full-year fiscal 2026 earnings, highlighting growth in net sales, positive omnichannel comparable sales, and robust internet sales despite challenging economic conditions and declining market categories. The company emphasized its strategic evolution from a product-driven to a multi-platform lifestyle brand, backed by new product launches like Snugg, re-engineered Sactionals with a "Made in America" initiative, and expanded customer acquisition engines including enhanced digital capabilities and showroom experiences. Lovesac provided fiscal 2027 outlook, anticipating continued market share gains and long-term value creation through innovation and strategic investments.

feed.title: Tesla’s EV Sales Miss Expectations Again in Deepening Slump (TSLA)
feed.summary: Tesla Inc. reported one of its weakest sales quarters in years, delivering 358,023 vehicles worldwide in the first quarter, significantly missing Wall Street's expectation of 372,160. This marks the second consecutive quarter the company has failed to meet projections, highlighting its ongoing struggles in the electric-vehicle market. The shortfall indicates deepening challenges for Tesla's core business amidst a competitive environment.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy (FANG) Stock Rises After Mizuho Adds It to Top Picks List
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) stock initially rose 3.9% after Mizuho Americas added it to its top picks list with a $220 price target, replacing ConocoPhillips. Analyst Nitin Kumar cited Diamondback's strong shale inventory and efficiency improvements as key reasons for the upgrade. However, the stock later reversed course falling 3.63% due to profit-taking, insider selling, a secondary offering, easing geopolitical tensions, and a pullback in crude oil prices.

feed.title: Qualcomm Inc. Stock: Navigating Semiconductor Leadership Amid Diversification and Market Volatility
feed.summary: Qualcomm Inc. is navigating semiconductor leadership amidst market volatility, with its shares experiencing a dip on NASDAQ despite strong fundamentals in 5G, automotive, and AI. The company's core business model, driven by equipment/chipset sales and a robust licensing model, provides stable revenue, and its strategic diversification into automotive and AI is expected to fuel long-term growth. Investors are closely monitoring these diversification efforts and analyst targets as key drivers for future performance.

feed.title: IDEX Corporation to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: IDEX Corporation announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before the market opens. Following the release, the company will host an investor conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. CT with CEO Eric Ashleman and CFO Sean Gillen to discuss the results. The webcast will be available on the company's Investor Relations site, and a replay will also be accessible.

feed.title: Big U.S. warehouse leases now show rent declines, CoStar says
feed.summary: CoStar reports that U.S. industrial asking rent growth has moderated across all lease size ranges in Q1 2026, following significant gains from 2021-23. Notably, leases 50,000 sq ft or greater now show a 2.7% annual rent decline, while smaller lease segments have largely muted or less than 1% growth. Regional variations exist, with mountain and northeastern states still seeing stronger gains for large leases, and smaller leases facing moderation due to increased supply and economic uncertainty for small businesses.

feed.title: BNY 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) announced details for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, scheduled for Tuesday, April 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The meeting will be held virtually, with stockholders able to participate, vote, and ask questions online, and a conference call option available for listening. BNY, a global financial services company, oversees $59.3 trillion in assets under custody and/or administration and $2.2 trillion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Cvent Named a Leader for Third Consecutive Year in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Event Marketing and Management Platforms
feed.summary: Cvent has been recognized as a Leader for the third consecutive year in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Event Marketing and Management Platforms, positioned highest in Ability to Execute. The company also ranked highest in all three Use Cases in the companion Gartner® Critical Capabilities™ report. This achievement underscores Cvent's commitment to AI innovation, recent acquisitions of Goldcast and ON24, and its efforts to integrate event data into broader marketing technology stacks to help organizations plan, market, and measure events effectively.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp posts Q1 results April 16, call starts at 7 a.m. CT
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) announced details for its first-quarter 2026 earnings conference call. The company will release its Q1 results before market open on Thursday, April 16, 2026, followed by a conference call at 7 a.m. CT hosted by CEO Gunjan Kedia and CFO John Stern. The call will be accessible via webcast and telephone, with replay information also provided.

feed.title: BlackRock Urges ECAT Shareholders to Vote WHITE Voting Instruction Form in Upcoming Director Election
feed.summary: BlackRock's ESG Capital Allocation Term Trust (ECAT) is urging shareholders to vote for its Class I, II, and III Board Member Nominees using the WHITE voting instruction form for the annual meeting on June 9, 2026. The trust highlights its strong performance, including an 86% cumulative return since 2023 and significant distributions, which it attributes to the existing board's actions. ECAT faces a contested election from an activist investor and emphasizes that voting the WHITE form is crucial to protect long-term investments and monthly payouts amidst potential changes.

feed.title: BNY stockholders can vote online at April 14 virtual meeting
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE: BK) will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders virtually on April 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Stockholders can participate, vote, and ask questions online using a 16-digit control number from their proxy materials. An archived audio webcast will be available from April 15 to May 15, 2026, for those unable to attend the live virtual event.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Announces First Quarter Earnings Conference Call Details
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) will release its first quarter 2026 earnings results on Thursday, April 16, 2026, before market open. A conference call will be held at 7 a.m. CT with CEO Gunjan Kedia and CFO John Stern to discuss the financial results. The call will be accessible via webcast on the U.S. Bancorp website or by telephone, with replay options available.

feed.title: Innovative Aerosystems Acquires License for Honeywell Power Generator Systems, Further Expanding Electrical Power and Sustainment Capabilities
feed.summary: Innovative Aerosystems has acquired an exclusive perpetual license from Honeywell International Inc. for power generator systems supporting Boeing 767, KC-46, and F-15 aircraft. This strategic move strengthens Innovative Aerosystems' capabilities in aircraft electrical power generation and sustainment. The acquisition includes key operational assets and aims to enhance support responsiveness, preserve technical continuity, and pursue future modernization opportunities for these critical platforms.

feed.title: Fortinet’s May 6 earnings call will stream live with replay online
feed.summary: Fortinet (NASDAQ: FTNT) is scheduled to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, with a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET). A live, listen-only webcast will be available on the company's Investor Relations website, along with remarks from the CEO and CFO, supplemental slides, and a replay. This announcement follows Fortinet's strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results and focuses on setting the timetable for Q1 2026.

feed.title: Emerson automates Louisiana plant turning waste wood into carbon-neutral power
feed.summary: Emerson has been selected to automate Strategic Biofuels' $2-billion Louisiana Green Fuels facility, a wood-fired power plant with integrated carbon capture and sequestration. This project will convert 1.3 million tons of forestry residuals annually into 100 MW of carbon-neutral electricity while storing 1.1 million metric tons of CO₂. Emerson will deploy its DeltaV Automation Platform and other advanced technologies to optimize plant operations and ensure efficient, continuous performance.
